name: Beri
short: One Piece-themed economy cog — routes all balances through BeriCore API.
description: Adds gambling games (blackjack, roulette, dice, horse racing, video poker, coinflip, slots), work/crime/hack/slut/rob activity commands, passive message income, role stipends, and a full audit log. All balance operations go through BeriCore. No caps, no shop, no boosters.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs, message income cooldown timestamps, role stipend collection timestamps, and transaction history (actor, reason, delta, timestamp). Balances are stored and managed by BeriCore.
author: UltPanda
install_msg: Thanks for installing Beri! Make sure BeriCore is loaded first. Use `[p]beriset info` to confirm status and configure the cog.
